response:
Subject: Thank You for Your Support  

Dear Mr. Ivan Klimkovic,  

Thank you for your helpful and detailed response.  

I would like to clarify that the current machine vision system in question is the FLIR FL3-U3-120S3C-C. Based on the technical data attached to this email, the image sensor used is the Sony IMX172, not the e2V sensor.  

I have attached the FL3-U3-Technical-Reference PDF file for reference. Please review page 18 for the detailed datasheet. Additionally, for quantum efficiency information, please refer to the FL3-U3-EMVA-Imaging PDF file, page 13.  

I will carefully study these files and manuals and get back to you with further details.  

Thank you again for your assistance.  

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
